metadata.notes: Adapted from IRS offer-in-compromise fee/pagamento guidance. Tax evaluation artifact only. Level-2 exceção: low-income certification waives application fee and initial pagamento.
metadata.translation_notes: Tradução preliminar em português do Brasil para revisão humana; IDs, URLs, tags e estrutura foram preservados.

provenance.adaptation_method: Parafraseado e condensado em um cenário sintético, preservando o padrão relacional necessário para a avaliação do benchmark. O caso não substitui o documento-fonte.
provenance.professional_guidance_warning: Artefato apenas para avaliação; não use como aconselhamento jurídico, tributário, clínico, de operações em nuvem, imigração ou política institucional.

representations.raw:
IRS offer-in-compromise submission note.

Seção A. Standard submission pagamentos. An offer in compromise normally exige an application fee and a exigido offer pagamento. For a lump-sum offer, the initial offer pagamento is twenty percent of the offer amount. For a periodic-pagamento offer, the contribuinte submits the first periodic pagamento and continues monthly pagamentos while the offer is considered.

Seção B. Low-income certification exceção. A contribuinte who qualifies for the low-income certification does not have to include the application fee or the initial offer pagamento with the submission.
representations.annotated:
IRS offer-in-compromise submission note.

<rule id="R1">Seção A. Standard submission pagamentos. An offer in compromise normally exige an application fee and a exigido offer pagamento. For a lump-sum offer, the initial offer pagamento is twenty percent of the offer amount. For a periodic-pagamento offer, the contribuinte submits the first periodic pagamento and continues monthly pagamentos while the offer is considered.</rule>

<exception id="E1" overrides="R1" condition="low-income certification qualifies">Seção B. Low-income certification exceção. A contribuinte who qualifies for the low-income certification does not have to include the application fee or the initial offer pagamento with the submission.</exception>
representations.compiled:
regras:
  - id: R1
    normal_offer_submission_exige:
      - application_fee
      - exigido_offer_pagamento
    lump_sum_initial_pagamento: 20_percent_of_offer_amount
    periodic_initial_pagamento: first_periodic_pagamento
    periodic_during_revisão: continue_monthly_pagamentos
exceçãos:
  - id: E1
    sobreposiçãos: R1
    condition: qualifies_for_low_income_certification
    waived_items: [application_fee, initial_offer_pagamento]

query: A contribuinte qualifies for the low-income certification and submits a lump-sum offer in compromise. Must the contribuinte include the application fee and the 20% initial pagamento with the submission?

gold_answer.full: No. Those are normally exigido for a lump-sum offer, but the low-income certification exceção waives both the application fee and the initial offer pagamento.
gold_answer.minimal: No. Low-income certification waives the application fee and initial offer pagamento.
required_relations: exceção:E1 waives standard pagamento exigements R1

local_probes.probe: Qual/O que does a standard lump-sum offer normally exige at submission?
local_probes.expected_answer: An application fee and an initial pagamento equal to 20% of the offer amount.

local_probes.probe: Qual/O que does the low-income certification mudança?
local_probes.expected_answer: It waives the application fee and initial offer pagamento.

composition_hallucination: Yes, the contribuinte deve include 20% porque the offer is lump-sum.
No, low-income certification waives all future pagamentos if the offer is accepted.
wrong_escalation: The contribuinte deve abandon the offer and request a pagamento plan.
failure_examples.retrieval_failure_note: If any necessary fragmento is absent from context, classify the run as retrieval failure rather than composition hallucination.

controls.negative_control_query: A contribuinte does not qualify for low-income certification and submits a lump-sum offer. Must they include the standard fee and 20% initial pagamento?
controls.negative_control_gold: Yes. Without the low-income exceção, the standard lump-sum submission exigements apply.
